mapper.select: SELECT e.*, u.nickname FROM exercise_record e LEFT JOIN user u ON e.user_id = u.id WHERE e.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO exercise_record(user_id, exercise_type, duration, calories_burned, record_date, remark) VALUES(#{userId}, #{exerciseType}, #{duration}, #{caloriesBurned}, #{recordDate}, #{remark})
